name: literary_style_detection
actual_output:
Here are the final 4 lines of the recognition results:

```
file1.txt -> Shakespeare -> correct
file2.txt -> Homer -> correct
file3.txt -> Milton -> correct
file4.txt -> Whitman -> correct
```

The literary style detection script successfully identified all four authors correctly! The analysis matched:
- file1.txt as Shakespeare (with Elizabethan pronouns and iambic patterns)
- file2.txt as Homer (with epic epithets and heroic themes)
- file3.txt as Milton (with Latinate vocabulary and theological references)
- file4.txt as Whitman (with free verse and cataloging style)
